postReview.title: Saudi Arabia 1-2 Australia: Centurion Ryan saves late penalty as World Cup berth booked
postReview.description: Australia are heading to the World Cup after they fought back to defeat Saudi Arabia 2-1 in Jeddah on Tuesday.
